reviews.review_title: Still the best WW2 flight game on quest
reviews.review_description:
This game is massive in content . Best WW2 flight game on quest despite the old graphics. They actually have an old school campaign too.

Compared to Warplanes series where you can only play as Americans in this game you can be most of the important  aerial armies during WW2. 

Only people who complain about this game are gamers who expect a finished game to be updated for 50 years.

ok in all fairness this game deserves a 5 star review for the gameplay. my reason for only giving a one star is more due to the devs. the games last update was 3 years ago I bought this game a month  or so ago  .... shortly after seeing the remaster they announced and what it would add to the game. I have since learned that they basically abandoned gunship sequel ww2 and moved on to a new project... after announcing a major update. the current campaign is only 1 map essentially 1 mission spanning over 8 days (ingame)  my honest opinion is it's a good game but current state  and promises made I'm not gone lie if I say it's a bit disappointing it's such a good game that just got abandoned  after a promise was made. content that could have breathed new life into this title... and devs if you read this I that update does ever come I will give it the 5 stars it deserves

What a difference when playing on IPad or IPhone  you get the 90% flying experience in feeling and  sight you get to turn your head and there is your enemy or wing man  faster than the 2 d 
I recommend this for all those who don’t have motion sickness , hopefully the designers add more to this in updates I suggest the meta quest anytime it adds to flying WORLD WAR TWO fighter planes ENJOY !!!

I was playing arcade in 3rd person, in my I-16, was a zero, chased it, we dogfighted, I won, he respawns 20 SECONDS LATER in another zero, and I’m already damaged, so when I pull to fight him, my wing snaps like a Kit Kat, and I then become a helicopter until the ground tells me not.

I’ve played on mobile for years, but this is NEXT LEVEL! It’s way easier to get planes, no fiddling around with gold or a subscription, and just an overall better experience. It would be nice to get an update adding some other planes and the whole app getting a facelift. 

Edit: Also if you guys would add the B-29 Superfortress that would be cool. 😄

Edit 2: Better filtering on usernames and in the text chat would also be appreciated. A reporting function would be good too. In realistic an option to get rid of the entire hud would be nice, and I would also like the addition of squadrons.

Edit 3: A graphics update would be BENEFICIAL for this game! 

Sorry for the long review, you devs do a great job, and I know you’re busy working on another 
game, but these things could make this the best WW2 flight sim on VR!

Sincerely, 
Killdeer45
This game is good and all that I wanted to do a B-17 fourth formation

of is a very good game in has good physics and is is overal a very solid game it just nerds more things to do i played the campaine and i kunt needed to keep flying back and fort don’t get me wrong its is a lot of gunt is is just a lot of the same and no one plays anymore i would defenitly dont recomed buying it it is a dead game but it is overal good
It sucks that the last update was 3 years ago
Play most every day needs more control in cockpit . Flaps , engines off and on .

reviews.review_title: Amazing game a lot of plane good physics
reviews.review_description: No one plays anymore but overall good

Don't buy this game.. Phanotek is nothing more than a money-grabbing DB who doesn't ever update. Reward developers like World Lens VR, who appreciate their customers.
Online? Forget it, the game is full of cheats, hackers and modders, it makes GTA V online look secure.....

This game has been such a great outlet for me and my love for piston driven propeller ww2 fighters. 
The game has a great gameplay, many game modes and famous battles that took place in that time period. With a list of over a dozen if not two dozen planes you can unlock for each world power that participated in that time as well as skins for your planes/tanks. The game is a few years old and has a smaller player base but I’m keeping my hopes the game regains more popularity on the vr. 
DEVS- PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE revisit the game and add more! I know it can regain more popularity.

Thank you if anyone who worked on this game takes the time to read this.

Maybe this was all it was supposed to be.  But it feels unfinished or something like they created the characters and the world but never wrote the play/book. 

THIS SHOULD AND COULD BE THE BEST WW2 SIM OUT THERE. 

No story no drama.  The game play is great. It really puts you there. But No campaign or wierd campaign i cant tell. No historical missions.  There is a 8 day war campaign but I can never tell if I won or not. 
Feels more like a toy chest than a actual game.

reviews.review_title: Really good just doesn't update anymore
reviews.review_description: Ive played this game for a while and its one of my favorite games i own every plane and tank it just doesn't update or have mods i reccomend 👍

What a great surprise. I came across this game by chance and I'm thrilled. 50 Aircrafts, huge maps, day/night circles, takeoff/landings, fuel consumption, Multiplayer, Campaign, 2 levels of difficulty, 
The flight physics feel good and in the higher difficulty levels there are redouts and blackouts and many other cool stuff. 
A little bit more Interaction in the Cockpit beside the Flight Stick and Throttle would be cool. 
For example Flaps, Gears etc. 
And a option to turn off the HUD, would be awesome! 

Dear developers, this game deserves a graphic upgrade for Quest 3, please don't let it die.... If you were to do exactly such a Simulation with WW1 Aircrafts, you have my Money for sure!

Love the game played it since it came out out ( But you haven’t updated the game in a few years !!!  And it is getting old. ) Add some new  planes, maps etc. Make  it so two people can get in a bomber ￼or rear gunner.
  
Come on guys or ladies do some work on Gunship,  could be a whole lot better. 
  
Or sell it to someone that will  !!!

Just got the game and already praying for a fresh update because it's such a great WWII flight sim game and deserves a good overhaul to boost the graphics and enhance the gameplay! The multi-player dogfights are phenomenal, most realistic ones among all flight combat titles, and I have them all!!
So this game has a potential to become a masterpiece and can't wait for the developers to take it to the next level!

I love this game but you have not added to it. There is only 1 campaign. The online gaming action is fun too but also needs more added to it. Add more planes. There is tons missing it seems. I am beginning to get bored with the same games.

Love the flight physics in this game. 5 stars when you clean up the voice chat and allow joining in squads so friends can fly together.
Bliind VR
Tank interior and pby catalina. The game in general is great.

I’m not out on this game yet.  For me, my view/seating position repeatedly changes with no way to “recenter” to a comfortable position.  To the point where the throttle was “inside” my armrest where I couldn’t physically grab it.  Got tired of trying new boundaries over and over.

I love this game because I was looking for a WW2 plane game and I seen this game on YouTube and I loved it and it had all my favorite planes in it except the Horten ho 229 I would love to see it in game but if I was to rate it would be a 15/10 would recommend

this is a great game but ruined by the PC (dc world) fighters who always have better planes than you (because they can fix camera on you).The spitfires and mustangs are below par against the later BF 109. Looking forward to better spitfires and mustangs which I know were around towards the end of the campaigns. Also more tanks please.

Love playing this game, it’s my alltime favourite realistic sim.

This is the most detailed flight simulator I've played with on quest VR, I had played the game before on a tablet and it was much harder to play. I love the carrier operations and the campaign mode, all I ask is that you have more than one campaign! Also when you play instant dogfight there's only one map where you can land and reload, all other maps have runways but they don't refuel and repair? I really like this simulator and I hope they continue to improve on the product. I think this game would attract a lot more players if it was a little more polished and finished. Other than that you definitely get your money's worth with this game!

reviews.review_title: Ok but not as good as warplanes
reviews.review_description: The tank games are more down to earth than the dog fights. The enemy always has a better plane that can turn around on the dime and come from behind  and shoot you down as soon as you pass them.  If you try to do that you either black out or your planes starts to break apart and you crash. The graphics are generic, low grade. If it wasnt for the tanks i wouldnt play it.

reviews.review_title: Super fun with all it lets you do, but..
reviews.review_description: I know this game is developed on limited hardware such as mobile And VR. So I understand the limitations to the sizes of the battles. My only dream is that maybe they release a more powerful version for newer devices such as the quest three and heck even maybe on PC so there can be large scale air battles. I would love to see tons of planes flying in formations attacking bomber columns and Large formations of dive-bombers making runs on enemy ships and bases and just large dog fights￼ etc (The Battle Stations games did this￼)…. This game has that however, a lot smaller in scale, I think the AI is capped to around 20? Don’t quote me on that. And another thing would be really cool if you could get out and walk around to other positions in the gun ships instead of just hot swapping to different seats. Other than that this game is the best flight game I’ve ever played. And I’m not even a “plane guy” haha. Oh, and one last thing, I was excited to play as the SBD dauntless as it’s one of those plans with a rear gunner, To my dismay I turned around to see that no one’s in the gunner seat and it’s just empty. Don’t know if that’s a bug, or maybe I have to upgrade/unlock a rear gunner ? Hopefully that’s the case because it seems really odd to just have an empty gunner seat back there…when it could be filled with an AI gunner that you could switch to if you wanted like in the bomber planes.

developer_response.body: Thanks for review, we noted your comment and will improve the game in future updates.

reviews.review_description:
It’s a fun game but gets repetitive quickly, the main issue is the controls don’t always work (about 40% of the time) which makes the airplane useless. The only  option is to bailout and respawn. 

I got the game on sale for $7.99 so for the price it’s not bad.

If you wanted a war thunder styled game but don’t want to spend months grinding to just get on plane. Being able to just upgrade the planes and buy the planes with XP is nice. The only thing that I don’t like is the way they do the waist guns, specifically on the B-24 and B-17, and to an extent the cheek guns and the radio gun on the B-17. The way the hand tracking works if good for the turrets, but I’m always wanting to grip the waist guns and I’m not a fan of how you move your hand one way and the gun moves in the opposite direction. If the developers could change that to something where you can grip them like the yolk, that would be great. But if you can’t because of limitations then I get it. All in all great game.

I love this game a lot and I think it’s even better then games like ”War Planes Over The Pacific“ I know the dev/devs are in the process of developing a new game at the moment but I’m hoping they can still work on this game and do things like add more tanks and more bombers. I will say it does like to make your mic sound worse (I assume for effect) and it does tend to make it kinda difficult to hear others. But this game definitely has potential. Please don’t stop working on it
When I try to play the campaign it says pick a place to spawn but it doesn’t work no matter what I pressed or did nothing happened if anyone could help me with it that would be great

reviews.review_title: Better than having a PC to run war thund
reviews.review_description: Best 20 bucks spent and already have a me 262 and B-17G I recommend getting this

reviews.review_title: Everyone should have this on their quest
reviews.review_description: This is easily my favorite standalone VR game of all time! I am an early supporter of gunship IV and I know I’m not alone in awaiting the VR release. I would really like to see the developer focus on a WW1 game as nothing beats the knife fighting of close quarters kite combat in VR. Warplanes WW1 is fun and all but I would like to realistically take off fly over no man’s land and get into a fireball just to land realistically back at my aerodrome. I would happily support a title like this in a heartbeat.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your supports! The game is coming the Quest store by this fall.

reviews.review_title: Feels like I'm playing War Thunder
reviews.review_description: I can't believe I didn't find this game sooner. I have played and own all the Warplane games which are great.. but this is just so much fun to play. I've seen things man.. crazy things man..
Been playing this game since I was like 13😂 I’m 19 now and it’s crazy to see this game come such a long way yo I’m playin wings of duty on vr!!!! Only the ogs understand

This game is amazing. I really love realistic flight simulator games. this is it!! The cockpit is really realistic it is prefect 20$ it is so worth it it is easy to control the planes. and it feels so real. The cockpit feels so real. I just can't wait till gunship-iv comes to vr it will be amazing!!!  if you love flight simulators. this is it and. the  selection of planes is just amazing
There is no better feeling than coming in slow and low over the radar towers with gear down and full flaps then turning onto finals to land at the little grass runway

Great flying game for those with a Meta VR headset.  Many varieties of WW2 aircraft, from various countries both Allied and Axis, which perform very close to their real flying characteristics.  You can grasp the stick or yoke with one had and the throttle with the other but those are the only controls you could grasp.  Buttons work gear/flaps, hook for those carrier based planes and to switch between weapons.  
It would be an even better flying experience if a new update to the game would allow you to “grasp” landing gear and flap handles to operate those instead of using buttons to select.  That would free up some buttons for other functions.
Overall it’s fun to play and hasn’t gotten old….yet.:)
Awesome. Fun. Realistic.
For a ww2 lover this is the game especially you get to have the b-17 this is worth the money

There's no vehicles in anything besides America. And i'm not really sure how to really feel about the game but it is good

reviews.review_title: I’d get a Quest just so I could play
reviews.review_description: This is probably my all time favorite game. The VR version is quite realistic and fun. If I didn’t already have a VR headset I’d get one to keep playing! Is Gunship 4 still being released later this month ??
Love the game, just wish the yaw input was smoother and the communication and bomb release button worked independently when in bombing mode

I've never played this other than on Oculus vr. I don't know if it's true, but it seems like the controls on the Oculus prevent you from turning as tight as the non-vr players which makes you fly smarter. One thing that you should never do is go head on with a ME-109 because it's nose Cannon will shred your aircraft most times.  Most American planes can outrun more maneuverable Japanese planes so do your head on attack and if you don't blow them out of the sky then get some distance, turn around and do it again.

reviews.review_title: Another go to app for me (daily).
reviews.review_description: Great game, but could the developers make it possible for the target indicators to turn off as the player approaches the ground targets please.?They(red.indicators) block my view of the targets till the last moment of my approach. I'm sure that must bug other players.  Flak guns are easy to spot anyway without those pesky indicators. Thanks.
I love the game but I wish move into the jet age.
WILL YOU PUT PREMIUM PLANES IN THE JAPANESE HANGER PLEASE!!!! FIX MY SCOPE ON THE TANK. OTHER THAN THAT ITS A GREAT GAME. ITS LIKE BEING IN THE COCKPIT!!!!

reviews.review_title: Best ww2 flight sim on Quest
reviews.review_description: This so good. The physics are not arcade like at all the grind for new planes is not very hard at all. Can’t wait to see if you plan to add more aircraft to the game.
I just wish you could turn off the hud elements and maybe if there were more controls you can push or flip that would be great too

This game can be one of the very BEST, but I suggest taking flight controls from the Warplanes series. I can never get the stick forward in first person mode no matter how I adjust myself of my game. Bomber controls for gunners are also off. I’d suggest making the guns having a “grab” point to aim and fire them. I REALLY want this game to be great!
I had this game on my phone and it was fun but in vr it’s even funner and realistic. I can’t wait till Gunship 4 comes out

reviews.review_title: It’s pretty good, but needs adjustment.
reviews.review_description:
Alright let’s get this clear: I’ve been playing this game on mobile since around 2018-2019. In that time, I unlocked every BF-109, half of the American tree, and random planes I thought were fun. And I am glad to see that they removed gold from the VR exclusive version. Yes, you have to pay for the game, but on mobile you could spend close to $100 to unlock all the planes, so this is immediately better. On the mobile version, the average low ranking plane is about 5000-10000 XP, while on here it’s either free or less than 3500 XP. 

Now let’s get into my first I’m-Not-Sure-What-To-Think-Of-This moment: the grind. It almost feels too easy. Evidence in that I completely finished the Russian and British Air Trees with maxed out upgrades within 4 hours. I was pulling maybe 5000-7000 XP per game, at times more than 15000.

My biggest complaint is the lack of planes in some trees. In the German tree, add the HE-177, HE-162, TA-152.
In the Japanese tree, Add the B7A, G5N, KI-45. In the British tree, the Typhoon/Tempest, Spitfire Mk.XI, Lancaster Mk.III. In the Soviet Tree, the Lagg-3, MiG-3, PE-8. Also, Add Italy.

a smaller complaint is that I should not be in a I-16 and face against a jet powered ME-262 in a low tiered matchup.

other than those few complaints, it’s fun, and I’m positively addicted to it. 

Thanks for reading
can you guys add the Avro lancaster and a typhoon plane please and other planes to thank you.

I've played the gunship series of games for a while, and never expected to see it in VR. I'm glad this game exists, and especially on the quest. It has great physics and flying takes much more attention. The game isn't just a turn and shoot flying game, you actually have to apply BFM(basic fighter maneuvers) and tactics in order to take down bandits and I love that. For anyone who wants to get into realistic dogfighting on the quest, this is the game for you, especially if you love WW2 aviation. Although, keep in mind that at the moment no buttons, switches, etc are interactive, you can only move the yoke, and the yoke is controlled by tilting your controller, rather than actually moving the controller around, which may decrease immersion. Here is a list of this game's strengths and weaknesses as of October 16th 2022: 


Strengths: Great physics, rewarding to those who know BFM/CFM, lots of aircraft.

Weaknesses: No interactive buttons, yoke control system can be confusing at first and reduces immersion.

Both Strength & Weakness: You have to grind out a good amount of the aircraft in this game, meaning you can't immediately hop in a P-51D mustang or an Me-262, this can be frustrating to some, but also fun for others, just depends on what you like.

developer_response.body: The latest update allows players to interact with the stick either by arm movements or tilt control. Thanks!

reviews.review_description:
I think this is the best combat flight simulator available for quest 2 right now. Physics are great, the focus on realism is appealing to me. But I think it still needs some improvements, specially about the controls. My suggestions are:

1) Currently the yoke behaves like in VTOL VR, where you have to rest the quest controller on your leg and make small movements. Although this is great for comfort, it is quite immersion breaking for some people as the yoke in the game is positioned in the center, not in the lower right. It is also confusing for new players, specially those who never played VTOL VR. I would suggest to make 2 options available: confort (the current) and immersion, where the yoke would behave similar to Warplanes, with the position of the quest controller matching the position of the yoke.

2) Flaps and landing gear should also be controllable through interactive buttons/levers on the cockpit, not only by buttons in the quest control. This would bring immersion to a whole new level.

3) It would be great if the flaps in the wings move. Currently they remains stationary regardless of which position you set them.

Maybe sonw of these features are available and I didn't notice, but I hope this feedback helps the devs improve this great game!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedbacks!

1) Players could control the stick in both fashions: either rotating the controller or by moving the controller. It works seamlessly which allows players to have the advantages of both styles.

2) More interactive cockpit would be available soon. Please stay tune!

3) Most aircrafts have flaps animated and move according to the setting positions. This could be a bug on a particular aircraft. Please contact us via Discord channel for bug report.

Thanks again!
Dev

reviews.review_description: I’ll be honest I’m still installing the game but it already looks incredible, I recommend to get this game 100 percent
This game is AMAZING this is the best ww2 plane game ever I love this game.
I’ve had this game for about a month and it’s very fun. It has great graphics and the controls are easy to learn the.

Overall a good game. Graphics inside the planes and in the hanger are amazing.  Game play is pretty good. Controls arent bad after you play for a bit, with some of the gun controls being a bit wonky. Other reviews mention a better tutorial which is needed. When playing campaign mode, the time from spawn to the target is painfully slow. A few glitches here and there.  Hopefully updates are included as the initial price is a bit steep.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedbacks. We are working on the update with bug fixes and new playable aircrafts.

reviews.review_description: Hello again, amazing game like I have said but there is one bug that is a little annoying.  So when the respawn timer is going and you click the menu button to bring up the map and that timer ends and you respawn with that menu up you can’t control the aircraft or change the camera view or anything except for firing the guns and it’s not that big of a deal because you can simply respawn again. But anyway a great game and also when you retract the landing gear or bring it up the flaps will go down to 100%  or will go up to 0%. I would like that to be changed because when you want to put your gear down and have the flaps stay it would be nicer but enough of the complaining its a great game thank you developer for the good work, bye.

Respawn doesn't work, must exit game.  Bomber intercept requires me to break my neck, impossible to play.  Altimeter placement dumb, unable to use while flying.  Allow throttle to be used while resting controller on leg, holding arm up without support is torturous.  No sensitivity adjustment for controllers, which are WAY too sensitive.  Major upgrades needed.  Game has potential, but in very early stage of operability.
Crashed once and couldn't get it to respawn. Says pick a respawn point but did show a point. Controls aren't very good. Asking for a refund on this one.

Just finished a gameplay video for it on our YouTube channel RuckUp VR... I have to say this is a top notch game... For beginners the controls may be a little hard to get through, but once you figure it out, you're going to love this game. Huge amount of aircraft, including tanks and so much to do. Multiplayer is amazing and always have people in the servers! Great game 
https://youtu.be/LWpcoQrMloM

developer_response.body: The game uses "grab & rotate" for stick cockpit control, the same as VTOL VR, while arcade mode is "point & shoot".

reviews.review_description: This is quite possibly the best flight sim game on quest and with the other ww2 releases being a huge let down, this could realistically be the best ww2 game on the quest 2 right now
Not fantastic and Not impressed needs to be reviewed as a game. Has a lot to live up to WW1

reviews.review_title: A lot of planes, unlockables and fun
reviews.review_description: A really great game. I play it almost every day. I had to get used to the controls, as I was used to actually moving the flight stick. But now I can handle it very well. I would just like to grab the secondary weapons and turrets for real. There, aiming by controller inclination feels a little bit wrong.
The fighter experience is good, but I can't zoom the bomber sight according to the prompt

They need to sort out the controls in Vr nowhere near as good as  other titles on VR the game it’s  self is excellent but they have got to fix the control interface when you grab the stick it is not realistic movement at all

developer_response.body:
It's the limitation of the QUEST. If we implement realistic movements, the device would lose track when the pilot look away from the controllers and that situation happens a lot during air combat. 

It's actually better than other games since you just need to grab the control stick and then rest your hand anywhere comfortable during gameplay.

reviews.review_description: The  game Is  great and  easy  to play  lvling up to unloack all the units in the game can be  done  in a  few  weeks of play and the matches  are  genrally fun and engaging it needs  a  "Sequal" or  Successor  to  bring  it upto date  but  as  it  stands  is a  great  title minus its  lack  of  fidelity  bought  me   back the  vibes  of  traditional  only  Flight  games  such as FighterAce by Flyingrats software   Warbirds 2.0-3.0 and  Aces  High Aces  high is  still popular  amoungst  its  community   but  charges  a  subscription to access  most  of its  servers  all the  games  offer  the  same  gameplay   with  somewhat  better  graphics  and better  worlds  i  love  to  see  a  game  like these  hit  vr   that  even if it wasnt a  standalone  title but  they   could improve  the  graphics  to a level of those  games  as a  stand alone  and  have ai   i love the dynamic missions  in the multiplayer  its what  really makes  this  game   the main upcoming comptitor  for this game will be Aces  of  thinder  wich is built on the  same engine as warthunder  "Dagor Engine 8.2 i think is the  current"  if this  game could match the Fidelity of AoT this game would continue  to  thrive and power ahrad   but  to maps  would also have to happen  even if it was just  halfscale ofr  distances

This game needs some attention in VR, it's still in beta, but the concept is very nice, the physics is enough. I've been playing it a lot the last few days.There is a lack of explanations or tutorials on the gameplay differences between historical and realistic modes. Anyway, it can become a marvel in VR.

developer_response.body: New updates coming will have more explanation and improved tutorial. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This is the best flight sim you can buy on quest 2 but that's not what this game is it's a plane and tank battle game it has plenty of game modes offline and online to be happy with and online is booming tons of people online to play with it's so fun and the best plane game on quest 2 in my opinion it has more planes then you can play with no shortage here in planes and also plenty of tanks to drive just not as many as there is planes hopefully in the future they can add helicopters that would be really cool maybe even the option to drive the battleship as you can put yourself in a anti-aircraft Cannon. on the ground and drive and play them but not battleships. This is a perfect game for quest 2  keep up the great work I'm very happy to see such a great applab game. And at a time when the quest 2 was short on plane games great job. and by the way I have no problem using the stick controls in the realistic game mode it just takes time of learning 👍👍👍👍

Absolutely loving this game! Naturally there are some bugs to iron out, but the game is fun, easy to learn and the XP grind is perfect, enough to encourage play but not War Thunder levels of annoyance! 

The only thing I don’t know how to do yet is unlock more aircraft, like the B-17. It’s faded out like a lot of other aircraft and I can’t select it to unlock.

developer_response.body: B-17 would be unlocked when you fully upgrade the B-24. The same for other aircrafts, fully upgrade the aircraft before will have the next aircraft unlocked. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Great game but... i have bad problems every time they do an update. This latest update the graffics are so dark that I can't see. No matter how I adjust every option on my headset. Also there are no left or right hand  control options.  I loved the game till now

reviews.review_title: Good but needs a few tweeks
reviews.review_description: Love the amount of planes you can fly but controls need tweeking. First person joystick controls not good, check out Warplanes. It would also be better if the eject/bailout could be done first player or at least a parachute opens in third player.. The throttle and joystick halo ball is not really needed.
